author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for MCP XAA/IdP OAuth login flow (RFC 8693 token-exchange + RFC 7523 JWT-bearer, RFC 9728 PRM discovery, RFC 8414 AS metadata, token caching). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: substantial enterprise SSO feature with multiple RFCs to implement, JWT crypto, persistent token cache, and CLI flow. Multi-day implementation. Parent audit #523.
